user_story: As a System admin, I want to set the number of days after which a password expires, so that users are forced to rotate credentials periodically
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Password Policy screen; When I enter a value for "Number of days for password to expire" and save; Then passwords expire after that many days

user_story: As a System admin, I want to configure the maximum number of wrong password attempts, so that accounts are locked after repeated failed logins
acceptance_criteria: Given the Password Policy screen; When I set the maximum number of wrong password attempts; Then the account locks once that threshold is crossed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to define how many hours until a locked account is reactivated, so that users regain access automatically after a cooldown
acceptance_criteria: Given the max attempts are exceeded; When I set "Account will be made active after" hours; Then the account is reactivated after that period

user_story: As a System admin, I want to prevent reuse of previous passwords, so that users cannot cycle back to old credentials
acceptance_criteria: Given the Password Policy screen; When I set the maximum number of previous passwords that can't be repeated; Then those recent passwords are rejected on change

user_story: As a System admin, I want to enforce minimum and maximum password length, so that passwords meet complexity standards
acceptance_criteria: Given the Password Policy screen; When I set minimum and maximum length; Then new passwords must fall within that range

user_story: As a System admin, I want to require character categories such as upper case, lower case, special characters, and numbers, so that passwords are sufficiently strong
acceptance_criteria: Given the Password criteria setting section; When I enable the desired character requirements; Then passwords must include those character types

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save or cancel my password policy changes, so that I can persist valid settings or discard unwanted edits
acceptance_criteria: Given I have edited the password policy; When I click Save, Save & Next, or Cancel; Then the settings are persisted or discarded accordingly
